_meta.notes: Descriptions for LoreRim 5 mods. Built from Ultra profile modlist.

Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64).summary: The Skyrim Script Extender expands scripting capabilities far beyond vanilla limits. Required by virtually every complex mod in LoreRim.
Skyrim Script Extender (SKSE64).author: Ian Patterson, Stephen Abel, Paul Connelly

Address Library for SKSE Plugins.summary: Version-independent address data used by almost every SKSE plugin. Required by the majority of modern SKSE-based mods.
Address Library for SKSE Plugins.author: meh321

SSE Engine Fixes (skse64 plugin).summary: Fixes critical engine-level bugs including save corruption, tree LOD flickering, and dozens of other issues Bethesda never patched.
SSE Engine Fixes (skse64 plugin).author: aers, Nukem, Ryan

Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch.summary: Fixes hundreds of gameplay, quest, NPC, object, and placement bugs. Considered mandatory for any modded install.
Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch.author: Arthmoor

powerofthree's Papyrus Extender.summary: Adds new Papyrus functions and events used by many modern mods. A scripting library required by a large portion of LoreRim's mod stack.
powerofthree's Papyrus Extender.author: powerofthree

powerofthree's Tweaks.summary: A collection of engine-level tweaks and fixes including NPC AI improvements, spell absorb fixes, and dozens of quality-of-life corrections.
powerofthree's Tweaks.author: powerofthree

PapyrusUtil SE - Modders Scripting Utili.summary: Adds additional Papyrus script functions used as a dependency by many mods. Required by numerous systems in LoreRim.
PapyrusUtil SE - Modders Scripting Utili.author: exiledviper, schlangster

Keyword Item Distributor (KID).summary: Distributes keywords to items, armors, weapons and more via config files without needing a plugin. Powers many of LoreRim's distribution systems.
Keyword Item Distributor (KID).author: powerofthree

Spell Perk Item Distributor (SPID).summary: Distributes spells, perks, items, shouts, and more to NPCs via INI files. Used throughout LoreRim to make NPCs use various abilities and equipment.
Spell Perk Item Distributor (SPID).author: powerofthree

JContainers SE.summary: Extends Papyrus with JSON-based data structures. Required by several complex mods that need persistent data storage.
JContainers SE.author: silvericed, ryobg

MCM Helper.summary: Simplifies MCM creation and adds automatic settings saving/loading. Many of LoreRim's mods use MCM Helper for their configuration menus.
MCM Helper.author: Parapets

Base Object Swapper.summary: Swaps base game objects for alternate versions via config files. Enables massive visual diversity across Skyrim without plugin overhead.
Base Object Swapper.author: powerofthree

FormList Manipulator - FLM.summary: Manipulates form lists via config files without needing patches. Used by LoreRim to extend leveled lists and form collections cleanly.
FormList Manipulator - FLM.author: Parapets

AnimObject Swapper.summary: Swaps animation objects in the world via config files. Used to diversify objects like grindstones, tanning racks, and weapons sharpened on them.
AnimObject Swapper.author: powerofthree

Sound Record Distributor.summary: Distributes sound records to existing sounds without a plugin. Used to layer additional ambient audio throughout Skyrim.
Sound Record Distributor.author: powerofthree

Behavior Data Injector.summary: Injects behavior data into existing behavior files, allowing multiple animation mods to add their own data without conflicts.
Behavior Data Injector.author: Inpa Skyrim

Project New Reign - Nemesis Unlimited Be.summary: Behavior framework that allows multiple animation mods to work together. LoreRim's replacement for FNIS — required for the entire combat animation stack.
Project New Reign - Nemesis Unlimited Be.author: ShoryukenToTheChin, ShikyoKira

XP32 Maximum Skeleton Special Extended.summary: Extended skeleton with additional bone nodes for weapons, shields, and combat styles. The foundation for LoreRim's entire animation and equipment display system.
XP32 Maximum Skeleton Special Extended.author: Groovtama

Open Animation Replacer.summary: Replaces animations conditionally based on in-game state — equipment, health, location, etc. Powers nearly all of LoreRim's context-aware animations.
Open Animation Replacer.author: Ersh

Precision.summary: Gives melee weapons physically accurate hitboxes based on animation. Attacks only connect when the weapon is actually near the target — essential for MCO's combo system.
Precision.author: Ersh

SSE Display Tweaks.summary: Unlocks framerate, adds borderless fullscreen, and provides many display-related improvements for Skyrim SE.
SSE Display Tweaks.author: aers

Bug Fixes SSE.summary: Fixes a collection of bugs including the magic effect bug, enchanted armor bug, and various script issues not covered by USSEP.
Bug Fixes SSE.author: meh321

Scrambled Bugs.summary: Fixes a large number of engine bugs through SKSE — including experience gain issues, perk point bugs, and combat formula errors.
Scrambled Bugs.author: meh321

Container Distribution Framework.summary: Distributes items into containers via config files without patches. Used to populate loot in LoreRim.
Container Distribution Framework.author: Parapets

RaceMenu.summary: Comprehensive character creation overhaul. Adds sliders, overlays, sculpting tools, and saves character presets. Essential for LoreRim's appearance customization.
RaceMenu.author: expired6978

SkyUI.summary: Replaces Skyrim's menus with a PC-friendly interface and provides the Mod Configuration Menu (MCM) system. Required by most mods with settings.
SkyUI.author: schlangster

Navigator - Navmesh Fixes.summary: Fixes navmesh issues throughout Skyrim that cause NPCs to get stuck, take wrong paths, or fail to navigate correctly.
Navigator - Navmesh Fixes.author: Rasikko

Requiem - The Roleplaying Overhaul.summary: Completely delevels Skyrim's world — enemies have fixed stats, not scaled ones. Character building is stat-based and permanent. Early game is brutally dangerous; power comes from meaningful progression. The backbone of all LoreRim gameplay. Plan your build carefully before investing perk points.
Requiem - The Roleplaying Overhaul.author: Xarrian & Ogerboss

Requiem - Magic Redone.summary: Massively expands Requiem's magic system with hundreds of new spells organized by tier and school. Adds new perk branches and reworks Illusion to be more natural. Most magic build archetypes in LoreRim depend on this mod's spell options.
Requiem - Magic Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Weapons and Armor Redone.summary: Overhauls Requiem's weapon and armor balance. Adjusts stat distribution, material tiers, and crafting requirements for a more coherent progression system.
Requiem - Weapons and Armor Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Alchemy Redone.summary: Overhauls Requiem's alchemy system with rebalanced ingredient effects, revised potion durations, and new crafting requirements.
Requiem - Alchemy Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Races Redone.summary: Replaces Requiem's racial stat bonuses with a more balanced and differentiated set of racial abilities, making race choice more impactful.
Requiem - Races Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Birthsigns Redone.summary: Reworks Requiem's Standing Stone (birthsign) effects for more interesting and differentiated choices. Your Standing Stone is a permanent character decision.
Requiem - Birthsigns Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Stealth Redone.summary: Overhauls Requiem's stealth system with improved detection formulas and more consistent stealth gameplay for thief and assassin builds.
Requiem - Stealth Redone.author: Styyx

Requiem - Special Feats.summary: Adds special feats — powerful one-time choices tied to skill progression that define your character's identity at key milestones.
Requiem - Special Feats.author: Styyx

Requiem - Minor Arcana.summary: Adds minor magical abilities and small passive bonuses tied to skill thresholds, giving mage builds more mid-tier rewards.
Requiem - Minor Arcana.author: Styyx

Requiem Patch Central.summary: Central hub for Requiem compatibility patches with dozens of mods. Ensures balanced stat values and proper integration between Requiem and the rest of LoreRim.
Requiem Patch Central.author: Various

Requiem - Toggle Enchantment.summary: Allows toggling weapon enchantments on/off to save charges. Useful for enchanted weapons in Requiem where charges are a significant resource.
Requiem - Toggle Enchantment.author: Styyx

Requiem - Lockpicking Rework.summary: Overhauls Requiem's lockpicking system with new mechanics tied to the lockpicking skill. Lock difficulty is more meaningful at each tier.
Requiem - Lockpicking Rework.author: Styyx

Requiem - Pickpocket Rework.summary: Reworks Requiem's pickpocket skill and detection formulas for more consistent and fair thief gameplay.
Requiem - Pickpocket Rework.author: Styyx

Requiem - Customizable Spells Per Perk.summary: Allows configuring how many spells each Requiem perk unlocks, letting you tune spell acquisition pace to your preference.
Requiem - Customizable Spells Per Perk.author: Styyx

Requiem - Improved Spell Learning.summary: Improves how spell tomes interact with Requiem's perk requirements, making spell learning feel more logical and rewarding.
Requiem - Improved Spell Learning.author: Styyx

Requiem - Dragonborn Patch.summary: Official patch applying Requiem's deleveling and balance to the Dragonborn DLC. Adjusts all Solstheim enemies, gear, and quests.
Requiem - Dragonborn Patch.author: Ogerboss

Requiem - Vendor tweaks.summary: Adjusts merchant inventories and gold in Requiem to better reflect the economy — vendors have more appropriate stock and currency for each tier of play.
Requiem - Vendor tweaks.author: Styyx

Requiem - Exhaustion and Stamina Fix.summary: Fixes stamina regeneration and exhaustion behavior in Requiem so stamina-dependent builds feel fair and consistent.
Requiem - Exhaustion and Stamina Fix.author: Styyx

Requiem for the Indifferent Update.summary: Maintenance update and bugfix collection for Requiem, addressing script errors and edge cases in the base mod.
Requiem for the Indifferent Update.author: Styyx

Requiem - Lockpicking SKSE.summary: SKSE-based lockpicking skill integration for Requiem, replacing Papyrus-based detection with faster and more reliable SKSE hooks.
Requiem - Lockpicking SKSE.author: Styyx

Ordinator - Perks of Skyrim.summary: Overhauls all perk trees with 400+ new perks, enabling deep and specialized character builds. Every perk choice is permanent in Requiem — plan your build on paper first. Heavily patched into LoreRim's Requiem framework.
Ordinator - Perks of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Wintersun - Faiths of Skyrim.summary: Adds religion and worship to Skyrim. Pray at shrines to gain deity favor, unlocking powerful blessings and abilities from 70+ deities. Your chosen deity shapes your build — neglecting worship reduces favor over time. Check deity requirements before choosing.
Wintersun - Faiths of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Sacrilege - Minimalistic Vampires of Sky.summary: A clean, high-depth vampirism overhaul. Adds scaling hemomancy spells, improved vampire powers (at-will instead of 1/day), and a progression system tied to feeding. Used instead of Sacrosanct in LoreRim.
Sacrilege - Minimalistic Vampires of Sky.author: meh321

Growl - Werebeasts of Skyrim.summary: Overhauls werewolf and werebear gameplay with a perk tree, new abilities, and a progression system. The Companions questline path — a viable alternative to vampirism for beast-focused builds.
Growl - Werebeasts of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Apocalypse - Magic of Skyrim.summary: Adds 155 unique, lore-friendly spells across all schools. Many LoreRim magic builds rely on Apocalypse spells for their core combat rotation. Patched into Magic Redone.
Apocalypse - Magic of Skyrim.author: EnaiSiaion

Triumvirate - Mage Archetypes.summary: Adds 65 spells representing five archetypes: Druid, Cleric, Shaman, Warlock, Sorcerer. Tailored for thematic magic builds — pick an archetype and build around it.
Triumvirate - Mage Archetypes.author: EnaiSiaion

True Directional Movement - Modernized T.summary: Overhauls third-person movement with a target lock system, strafing, and directional movement that make Skyrim feel like a modern action RPG. The target lock (default: Middle Mouse) is essential for boss fights. Core to LoreRim's feel.
True Directional Movement - Modernized T.author: mrowrpurr

SCAR 2 - Skyrim Combos AI Revolution.summary: Makes NPCs use combo attacks intelligently — they check distance, angle, and conditions before each strike, then pick animations accordingly. NPCs fight like Dark Souls bosses. Required for LoreRim's combat to feel challenging and fair.
SCAR 2 - Skyrim Combos AI Revolution.author: maxsu2017

Combat Pathing Revolution.summary: Improves NPC combat movement and pathing so enemies reposition dynamically instead of standing still while attacking. Works with SCAR for intelligent combo + movement.
Combat Pathing Revolution.author: Maxsu

For Honor in Skyrim.summary: Adds a complete moveset framework inspired by the game For Honor, including guard stances, directional attacks, and parry mechanics. LoreRim includes a balance patch to integrate it with Requiem. Transforms melee combat into a skill-based system.
For Honor in Skyrim.author: Dservant

Attack MCO Maxsu Edition.summary: Modern Combat Overhaul (MCO) by Maxsu — replaces vanilla power attacks with directional, chained combo attacks. The backbone of LoreRim's melee combat animation system. Works with SCAR and Precision.
Attack MCO Maxsu Edition.author: maxsu2017, Distar

TK Dodge RE.summary: Adds a dedicated directional dodge mechanic with i-frames. Default key is Alt. Positioning and timing are critical in Requiem's punishing combat — dodge well or die.
TK Dodge RE.author: Ershin, tktk1

Block Commitment Overhaul SKSE.summary: Adds a configurable cost to canceling blocks and implements mage blocking with wards. Makes blocking a real commitment rather than a risk-free buffer.
Block Commitment Overhaul SKSE.author: Ersh

MaxsuBlockOverhaul.summary: Reworks the blocking system to be more responsive and consistent. Timing and positioning matter more for effective blocking.
MaxsuBlockOverhaul.author: maxsu2017

Chocolate Poise.summary: Adds a poise system inspired by Elden Ring. Accumulate enough hits and an actor staggers. Prevents stagger-lock through a recovery window between staggers.
Chocolate Poise.author: doodlezoid

Chocolate Poise Plus - Addons and Rebala.summary: Expands Chocolate Poise with INI tweaks, perk support, and rebalanced stagger types. Makes poise values consistent across all armor and weapon types.
Chocolate Poise Plus - Addons and Rebala.author: doodlezoid

VioLens - A Killmove Mod SE.summary: Adds configurable kill moves and kill cams for both melee and ranged combat. Controls probability, camera behavior, and player/NPC killmove settings.
VioLens - A Killmove Mod SE.author: Reko

Dismembering Framework.summary: Enables real-time dismemberment of NPCs and creatures — limbs and heads can be severed in combat. Adds blood splatters and adaptive sound effects. Extensive MCM controls.
Dismembering Framework.author: Inpa Skyrim

Precision - Enchanted Weapon Trails.summary: Adds enchantment visual trails to weapons based on their enchantment type, using Precision's hitbox data. Visual enhancement for enchanted melee weapons.
Precision - Enchanted Weapon Trails.author: Ersh

One Click Power Attack NG.summary: Separates power attack input from hold-to-attack so you can bind power attacks to a dedicated key. Required for MCO's combo system to work correctly.
One Click Power Attack NG.author: dTry

Bow Rapid Combo V3.summary: Adds combo attack animations for bows — rapid shooting, charging shots, and evasion moves. Transforms archery into an active combat style.
Bow Rapid Combo V3.author: Smooth

Bow Charge Plus.summary: Adds more control to bow charging — holding longer increases damage. Adds meaningful skill expression to archery timing.
Bow Charge Plus.author: Ersh

Dynamic Dodge Shot.summary: Adds shooting animations while dodging for a more fluid archery combat style.
Dynamic Dodge Shot.author: Smooth

Swift Potion NG.summary: Allows drinking potions without interrupting attacks. Configurable delay and animation. Quality of life for combat when managing health in Requiem's brutal encounters.
Swift Potion NG.author: Nightfallstorm

Ultimate Animated Potions NG.summary: Adds drinking animations when consuming potions. Immersive but adds a brief animation delay — plan your potion use in combat.
Ultimate Animated Potions NG.author: kur0ne

Dual Wielding Unlocker.summary: Allows dual wield attacks to be fully animated and functional with both hands independently. Required for proper dual-wield MCO animations.
Dual Wielding Unlocker.author: dTry

Parrying RPG.summary: Adds a timed parry system — perfectly timing a block just before an attack results in a powerful riposte. Adds high skill ceiling to blocking.
Parrying RPG.author: Ersh

Modern Stagger Lock.summary: Prevents enemies from being permanently stagger-locked by adding a brief immunity window between staggers. Makes combat feel fair for both player and enemies.
Modern Stagger Lock.author: Ersh

Stop On Slash AE - Hitstop and Screensha.summary: Adds hitstop and screen shake on successful hits, giving melee combat more weight and impact.
Stop On Slash AE - Hitstop and Screensha.author: Ersh

Next-Gen Decapitations.summary: Improves decapitation visuals and adds new decapitation kill animations for various weapon types.
Next-Gen Decapitations.author: Ersh

Immersive Equipment Displays.summary: Allows full customization of how weapons, shields, and equipment are displayed on your character's body. Weapons shown on back, hip, or custom positions. Includes NPC presets.
Immersive Equipment Displays.author: SlavicPotato

Simple Dual Sheath.summary: Adds a second sheathed weapon to your character's body, showing both equipped weapons simultaneously. Clean and lightweight implementation.
Simple Dual Sheath.author: SlavicPotato

Smooth Moveset.summary: Comprehensive moveset overhaul for unarmed, one-handed, two-handed, and spellcasting. Provides fluid, modern animation transitions for all combat situations.
Smooth Moveset.author: Smooth

Vanargand Animations.summary: High-quality animation overhaul for sneak, dual wield, crossbows, and movement. Part of the animation suite that gives LoreRim's stealth and archer builds their signature feel.
Vanargand Animations.author: Movement

Goetia Animations.summary: Premium animation overhaul for magic casting, shouts, and sneak magic. Gives mage and hybrid builds expressive, cinematic spell animations.
Goetia Animations.author: Smooth

Conditional Armor Type Animations.summary: Plays different locomotion animations based on equipped armor type — light, heavy, or robes. Each armor type has distinct movement personality.
Conditional Armor Type Animations.author: Eskyrim

Dynamic Animation Casting - NG.summary: Allows casting spells while performing other animations — running, attacking, jumping. Makes magic feel proactive rather than stand-still.
Dynamic Animation Casting - NG.author: Ersh

EVG Animated Traversal.summary: Adds context-sensitive traversal animations — climbing ledges, vaulting over fences, squeezing through gaps. Makes movement through the environment more immersive.
EVG Animated Traversal.author: DServant

SkyParkour v3 - Procedural Parkour Frame.summary: Adds parkour mechanics — vaulting, wall runs, and dynamic obstacle navigation. Makes traversal through Skyrim's environments more fluid and engaging.
SkyParkour v3 - Procedural Parkour Frame.author: Eskyrim

Immersive Interactions - Animated Action.summary: Adds interaction animations for sitting, using objects, picking locks, and more. NPCs and the player have realistic contextual actions.
Immersive Interactions - Animated Action.author: MongoMonk

NPC Animation Remix (OAR).summary: Adds varied idle animations for NPCs so they don't all use the same generic pose. Guards lean on walls, merchants shift weight, etc.
NPC Animation Remix (OAR).author: Eskyrim

Gesture Animation Remix.summary: Adds varied conversational gesture animations for NPCs during dialogue, making conversations feel more natural and alive.
Gesture Animation Remix.author: Eskyrim

Dynamic Looting and Harvesting Animation.summary: Adds animations for looting bodies, harvesting ingredients, and searching containers.
Dynamic Looting and Harvesting Animation.author: mrowrpurr

Dynamic Crafting Animations.summary: Adds crafting animations at smithing stations, alchemy tables, and enchanting tables for a more immersive crafting experience.
Dynamic Crafting Animations.author: mrowrpurr

Horse Behaviour Improvements.summary: Improves horse AI and movement behavior — horses navigate terrain better, respond more naturally, and feel less like static vehicles.
Horse Behaviour Improvements.author: Sable

Jump Behavior Overhaul SE.summary: Adds directional jump animations and improves jump behavior consistency for all movement states.
Jump Behavior Overhaul SE.author: Maxsu

Wade In Water Redone.summary: Restores Skyrim's cut wading animations when moving through shallow water. Makes river crossings and shoreline exploration more immersive.
Wade In Water Redone.author: DrJacopo

VIGILANT SE.summary: A massive quest mod featuring 8-10+ hours of new content. Fight against the Molag Bal cult as a Vigilant of Stendarr. Dark Souls–inspired in tone, with punishing bosses, unique armors and weapons, and a deep narrative. One of LoreRim's premier quest experiences. Recommended level: 40+ and full Requiem preparation.
VIGILANT SE.author: Vicn

Wyrmstooth.summary: Adds a new island — Wyrmstooth — with a substantial questline centered on a powerful dragon. Includes new dungeons, NPCs, armor, and weapons. A well-crafted expansion-quality mod. Recommended: Lv20+ and strong Requiem build.
Wyrmstooth.author: Jonx0r

The Forgotten City.summary: Award-winning time-loop mystery in an ancient underground Dwemer city. Heavy on dialogue, choice, and consequence. Multiple endings. Adapted into a standalone game. One of the most story-rich quest mods ever made — take your time with it.
The Forgotten City.author: Modern Storyteller

The Gray Cowl of Nocturnal - 10th annive.summary: Adds a large questline set in Hammerfell with a fully voiced cast. You pursue the legendary Gray Cowl of Nocturnal across a new area. Excellent production quality with custom music and complex quests.
The Gray Cowl of Nocturnal - 10th annive.author: Betalille

Undeath Remastered.summary: Adds a questline that lets you become a Lich — one of the most powerful undead forms in TES lore. Requires completing a complex ritual and facing powerful enemies. A major character arc choice with permanent consequences.
Undeath Remastered.author: Antioch08

SIRENROOT - Deluge of Deceit.summary: A dialogue-heavy dungeon dive into Ayleid ruins featuring puzzles, platforming, and water mechanics. Influences from Tomb Raider and Dragon Age. 2-5 hours with multiple endings. Hired by the Black-Briars to investigate a cave — nothing is what it seems.
SIRENROOT - Deluge of Deceit.author: ElSopa

Heart of the Reach.summary: Sends you into the Ever-Bog, an underground swamp beneath the Reach, to help a desperate priest. Features unique enemies, weapons, a ring, and a moral choice at the end. Start by speaking to Gwilym at the Silver-Blood Inn.
Heart of the Reach.author: jayserpa

Meridia's Order.summary: Expansive questline making you Meridia's Champion fighting a Necromantic Tyranny threat. 15+ quests with choice-based completion, fully voiced characters, and dynamic NPC decisions. Begin after completing 'The Break of Dawn' at level 12+.
Meridia's Order.author: Vesperjl

Sleepwalking Into A Nightmare - New Daed.summary: You track a missing woman and dive into her nightmares to overcome her fears in a quest tied to a new Daedric entity. Features 2 new spells, a helmet, bow, ring, and two endings. Fully voiced. Start by speaking to Ralforn north-east of Ivarstead.
Sleepwalking Into A Nightmare - New Daed.author: TheLootist

Siege at Icemoth.summary: Small-scale new lands mod adding islands in the Sea of Ghosts with new locations, dungeons, and unique items inspired by Elder Scrolls: Blades. Travel from the Old Wooden Jetty northwest of Skyrim. Read the waterlogged journal on a dead mercenary to start.
Siege at Icemoth.author: JaySerpa

Legends of Aetherium.summary: Adds a new dungeon, quest, armor set, and weapons tied to Aetherium lore. Fits naturally into the Dwemer questline. Features unique enemies and a detailed underground location.
Legends of Aetherium.author: JaySerpa

Miasma.summary: Fully-voiced quest set in the Ashlands of Solstheim. You assist an An-Xileel agent in taking down a rogue Telvanni wizard. Features a unique bow and lore-friendly references to TES locations. Speak to Haj-Xul at the Retching Netch. Recommended: Lv20+.
Miasma.author: OdinPlus

Extended Cut - Saints and Seducers.summary: Massively expands the Saints and Seducers Creation Club content into a full questline with proper voice acting, new locations, and a coherent story. Transforms CC content into real mod quality.
Extended Cut - Saints and Seducers.author: Bethesda, community expanded

Alternate Perspective.summary: Replaces Helgen with a new alternate start system. You begin in a configurable backstory location without the intro sequence. LoreRim uses this as the default start — choose your background wisely as starting location affects early-game Requiem difficulty significantly.
Alternate Perspective.author: SomethingObscure

House of Horrors - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands Molag Bal's daedric quest with new choices, consequences, and the option to refuse or fight back against the Daedric Prince. Adds moral weight to one of the game's darkest quests.
House of Horrors - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

Paarthurnax - Quest Expansion.summary: Gives players meaningful new options in the Paarthurnax dilemma — you can negotiate, find alternatives, or stand your ground against the Blades in a way that feels earned.
Paarthurnax - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

College of Winterhold - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands the College questline with new tasks, improved structure, and better integration of your academic role. Makes the mage faction feel more like an actual college.
College of Winterhold - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

The Only Cure - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands Peryite's daedric quest with new dialogue choices, additional objectives, and a more meaningful conclusion to the Afflicted storyline.
The Only Cure - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

The Whispering Door - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands Mephala's quest with new story beats, improved integration with Wintersun, and additional consequences for the choices made at Dragonsreach.
The Whispering Door - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

The Innocence Lost - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands the Dark Brotherhood recruitment quest with new choices — you can warn Aventus, investigate, or join through alternative means.
The Innocence Lost - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

Destroy The Dark Brotherhood - Quest Exp.summary: Greatly expands the option to destroy the Dark Brotherhood — adds a full questline, new NPCs, and proper content for the path Bethesda left almost empty.
Destroy The Dark Brotherhood - Quest Exp.author: jayserpa

Caught Red Handed - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands the Haelga blackmail quest with new options and consequences that fit the Thieves Guild's moral framework better.
Caught Red Handed - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

The Heart of Dibella - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands the Markarth temple quest with proper investigation, new NPCs, and meaningful choices tied to Dibella's divine domain.
The Heart of Dibella - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

Search and Seizure - Quest Expansion.summary: Expands the Thalmor Embassy infiltration with more options, better stealth routes, and meaningful consequences tied to what you discover.
Search and Seizure - Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

Nilheim - Misc Quest Expansion.summary: Adds a small quest for the Nilheim bandit encounter, giving the interaction more context and choice rather than a simple ambush.
Nilheim - Misc Quest Expansion.author: jayserpa

The Choice is Yours.summary: Prevents NPCs from starting quests until you explicitly agree. Stops random NPCs from dumping quests on you mid-conversation — essential for intentional roleplaying.
The Choice is Yours.author: kerstyn

Timing is Everything SE.summary: Controls when quests trigger based on level, skill, and other conditions. Prevents Dawnguard, Dragonborn, and other DLC quests from starting too early in Requiem.
Timing is Everything SE.author: kerstyn

Missives.summary: Adds radiant contract boards to towns throughout Skyrim. Bounties, deliveries, and small tasks that fit naturally into any playthrough and provide low-level income.
Missives.author: Loot and Degradation

INIGO.summary: A fully voiced Khajiit follower with ~7,000 lines of context-aware dialogue. Reacts to quests, locations, weather, and other followers. Has his own backstory and arc. One of the most sophisticated followers ever made — worth investing in his personal quest.
INIGO.author: Smartbluecat

Lucien - Immersive Fully Voiced Male Fol.summary: A fully voiced Imperial scholar follower with ~5,000 lines of commentary on quests, locations, and lore. Grows and changes based on your adventures. Has cross-mod banter with Inigo, Auri, and others.
Lucien - Immersive Fully Voiced Male Fol.author: Joseph Russell

Song of the Green (Auri Follower).summary: A fully voiced Bosmer archer follower with deep lore connections to Valenwood and the Green Pact. Has her own questline, dialogue reactions to every major quest, and banter with Inigo and Lucien.
Song of the Green (Auri Follower).author: Synth

Remiel-Custom Voiced Dwemer Specialist a.summary: A fully voiced Breton engineer with ~5,000 lines. She travels from Wayrest to explore Dwemer ruins and brings a reprogrammed Dwemer spider companion. Not a fighter — she supports and comments. Has her own framework similar to Inigo.
Remiel-Custom Voiced Dwemer Specialist a.author: Heironymous

Gore - A Companion Mod.summary: A fully voiced follower with 5,000+ lines including a Vigilant add-on. Gore has a dark past and is in love with life — complex character arc told through two main quests. Optional survival camping system. Coverage for all main factions and DLC.
Gore - A Companion Mod.author: Ryn

Katana - Journey in the Shadows.summary: A fully voiced Redguard follower with a stealth-focused playstyle and her own questline. Has unique dialogue and a personal arc about redemption and identity.
Katana - Journey in the Shadows.author: Alixander Court

The Thalmor's Shadow - Taliesin.summary: A fully custom voiced Altmer follower who works as a Thalmor intelligence operative. Morally grey, witty, and complex. Unique questline tied to Thalmor politics and Skyrim's civil war.
The Thalmor's Shadow - Taliesin.author: SerketHetyt

The Frozen Heart - Quest Mod.summary: A quest mod featuring a new follower, new locations, and a story about a cursed artifact. Includes custom voiced characters and dungeon content.
The Frozen Heart - Quest Mod.author: Various

Dark Hierophant Magic.summary: Adds a dark priest archetype with powerful debuffs, life drain, and bone magic spells. Patched into Requiem Magic Redone. Ideal for necromancer or dark cleric concepts.
Dark Hierophant Magic.author: Darenii

Ancient Blood Magic II.summary: Adds hemomancy spells focused on blood manipulation — sacrificing health for power, blood curses, and life-steal. Strong synergy with vampire builds.
Ancient Blood Magic II.author: Darenii

Frostbitten Dreams Magic.summary: Adds ice and dream-themed spells centered on slowing, freezing, and illusion-adjacent effects. Distinctive visual style and thematic cohesion.
Frostbitten Dreams Magic.author: Darenii

Wildwaker Magic.summary: Nature-themed magic pack with animal-summoning, root entanglement, and druidic spells. Best suited for nature mage or druid archetypes.
Wildwaker Magic.author: Darenii

Obscure Magic.summary: Adds esoteric, unusual spells that don't fit standard school categories — reality distortion, spatial manipulation, and occult effects.
Obscure Magic.author: Darenii

Sonic Magic.summary: Sound-based magic — sonic blasts, reverberating shockwaves, and ear-splitting screams. Fills a unique combat niche for a voice-themed mage.
Sonic Magic.author: Darenii

Constellation Magic.summary: Star and constellation-themed magic with celestial projectiles, astral shields, and starfall effects. Visually distinctive and thematically cohesive.
Constellation Magic.author: Darenii

Abyssal Tides Magic.summary: Ocean and deep-water themed magic — drowning curses, tidal waves, brine burns, and abyssal summoning. Excellent for mer or sea-themed characters.
Abyssal Tides Magic.author: Darenii

Runemaster Magic.summary: Nordic rune-based magic — inscribed runes, ward totems, and explosive glyphs. Thematically fits Nord or Dwemer-adjacent mage concepts.
Runemaster Magic.author: Darenii

Holy Templar Magic.summary: Divine paladin spells — holy light, sacred wards, radiant smites, and blessed restoration. Core spell pool for paladin or crusader builds.
Holy Templar Magic.author: Darenii

Wizarding Traversal Magic.summary: Adds magical movement spells — blinks, teleports, and levitation variants. Expands mobility options for dedicated mage builds.
Wizarding Traversal Magic.author: Darenii

Elemental Mastery Magic.summary: Expands fire, frost, and shock magic with new high-tier spells for each element. Gives elemental mages powerful endgame options beyond vanilla destruction.
Elemental Mastery Magic.author: Darenii

LoreBox - Item and Spell Tooltips.summary: Displays descriptive tooltips when hovering over items and spells in your inventory. Multiple mods can add tooltip text without conflicts. LoreRim uses this for spell and item lore text.
LoreBox - Item and Spell Tooltips.author: Parapets

Nightingale Powers Redone.summary: Overhauls the Nightingale Sentinel ability and Nocturnal's blessings to be more meaningful and thematically appropriate for the Thieves Guild arc.
Nightingale Powers Redone.author: Various

Spell Absorption Rework - A Non-Chance B.summary: Replaces Requiem's RNG spell absorption with a consistent percentage-based system. Makes magic resistance predictable and fair.
Spell Absorption Rework - A Non-Chance B.author: Styyx

Experience.summary: Overhauls how XP is gained — you earn experience from killing enemies, completing quests, discovering locations, and crafting, instead of skill use. Levels feel meaningful and intentional. Core to LoreRim's progression alongside Static Skill Leveling.
Experience.author: meh321

Static Skill Leveling Rewritten.summary: On level up, you spend points to increase skills directly instead of skills leveling from use. Works with Experience mod. Your skill investment choices define your build — this is your character sheet.
Static Skill Leveling Rewritten.author: meh321

Biggie Traits.summary: Adds character-defining traits chosen at the start of your playthrough. Each trait provides meaningful bonuses or drawbacks that shape your build identity. Patched into Requiem — your trait choice is permanent.
Biggie Traits.author: Biggie_Boss

Subclasses of Skyrim.summary: Adds subclass choices that provide specialized passives for focused archetypes — assassin, battlemage, ranger, etc. Works alongside traits and perks for deeper build identity.
Subclasses of Skyrim.author: Various

Perk Point Potion.summary: Adds rare craftable potions that grant bonus perk points. Provides an additional avenue for perk acquisition tied to alchemy investment.
Perk Point Potion.author: Various

Respawn - Soulslike Edition.summary: On death, you drop your gold at the death location and respawn at your last sleep point. Retrieve your gold or it's lost forever. Adds souls-like stakes to Requiem's already punishing difficulty.
Respawn - Soulslike Edition.author: eeeickythump

Save our Souls - Death Alternative.summary: On death, triggers a dramatic rescue or consequence rather than instant reload. Integrates with Respawn for narrative death mechanics.
Save our Souls - Death Alternative.author: Various

Survival Mode Improved - SKSE.summary: Fixes and improves Skyrim's built-in Survival Mode — better hunger/fatigue formulas, proper resting bonuses, and improved warmth calculations.
Survival Mode Improved - SKSE.author: Various

Survival Control Panel.summary: MCM panel for configuring Skyrim's Survival Mode — adjust need rates, sleep requirements, and warmth penalties to your preferred difficulty.
Survival Control Panel.author: Parapets

CC's Camping Expansion.summary: Expands the Creation Club camping content with additional features, recipes, and integration with survival mechanics.
CC's Camping Expansion.author: Various

Alchemy Requires Bottles Redux.summary: Makes alchemy require empty bottles to craft potions. Adds a resource management layer to alchemy — gather bottles from taverns and vendors.
Alchemy Requires Bottles Redux.author: Various

Equipment Durability System NG.summary: Adds weapon and armor degradation over time and use. Equipment must be repaired at smithing stations. Adds a maintenance dimension to gear management.
Equipment Durability System NG.author: Various

Dynamic Weather and Time Based Detection.summary: Adjusts NPC detection based on weather and time of day — harder to sneak in daylight, easier in fog and darkness. Makes stealth timing matter.
Dynamic Weather and Time Based Detection.author: GracesHeart

Smart NPC Potions - Enemies Use Potions.summary: NPCs intelligently use potions and poisons during combat based on their situation. Enemy healers and poisoners become real tactical threats.
Smart NPC Potions - Enemies Use Potions.author: Lively

NPCs Take Cover - Smarter Anti-Cheese AI.summary: Makes NPCs seek cover, flank, and reposition intelligently instead of standing in the open. Closes exploits where you could pick enemies off from safety.
NPCs Take Cover - Smarter Anti-Cheese AI.author: colinswrath

Simple Hunting Overhaul.summary: Adds skinning mechanics for animals — harvest pelts, meat, and organs from corpses using a hunting knife. Makes wildlife economically valuable.
Simple Hunting Overhaul.author: Various

Carry Your Carcasses.summary: Allows physically picking up and carrying animal carcasses. Works with Simple Hunting Overhaul for a complete hunting workflow.
Carry Your Carcasses.author: Various

Dynamic Mercenary Fees.summary: Mercenary costs scale based on your level and wealth. High-level players pay more for followers — economy stays relevant.
Dynamic Mercenary Fees.author: Various

Waterskin - Stay Hydrated In Tamriel.summary: Adds a waterskin item that must be refilled from water sources. Part of LoreRim's survival layer alongside food and sleep.
Waterskin - Stay Hydrated In Tamriel.author: Various

Just Blood - Dirt and Blood Lite.summary: Adds visible blood and dirt accumulation on the player and NPCs during combat and exploration. Lightweight visual immersion mod.
Just Blood - Dirt and Blood Lite.author: Various

No Crime Teleport RE.summary: Removes the teleportation behavior when guards arrest you — you walk to jail rather than being instantly transported. More immersive crime consequences.
No Crime Teleport RE.author: Various

Difficulty Sliders.summary: Separates Skyrim's global difficulty into individual sliders for damage dealt/received, NPC AI, and loot. Fine-tune your experience without affecting all systems at once.
Difficulty Sliders.author: Various

Legendary Enemies.summary: Adds rare legendary variants of enemies with enhanced stats, abilities, and unique loot. Makes the world feel more unpredictable and rewarding for high-level characters.
Legendary Enemies.author: Various

Engaging Combat - Keep Combat Dynamic at.summary: Prevents the late-game from becoming trivially easy by keeping enemies engaged and dangerous even as your character becomes powerful.
Engaging Combat - Keep Combat Dynamic at.author: Various

AI Overhaul SSE.summary: Improves NPC schedules, sandbox behavior, and daily routines. NPCs eat, sleep, work, and react more realistically. Dramatically improves town and city atmosphere.
AI Overhaul SSE.author: Dr. Jacopo

Guard Dialogue Overhaul SE.summary: Fixes guard dialogue so they stop referencing things they shouldn't know about, and adds context-appropriate new lines. Eliminates most immersion-breaking guard comments.
Guard Dialogue Overhaul SE.author: Eckss

Bandit Lines Expansion.summary: Adds hundreds of new voiced bandit lines covering more situations, reactions, and banter. Bandits feel less repetitive over a long playthrough.
Bandit Lines Expansion.author: jayserpa

Falmer Servant Lines Expansion.summary: Adds unique dialogue for enslaved Falmer servants, giving them personality and making their servitude more unsettling and lore-rich.
Falmer Servant Lines Expansion.author: jayserpa

Vampire Lines Expansion.summary: Adds new voiced dialogue for vampires and vampire thralls. Makes vampire NPCs feel more threatening and intelligent.
Vampire Lines Expansion.author: jayserpa

Civil War Lines Expansion.summary: Adds new dialogue for Stormcloak and Imperial soldiers, making the civil war feel like a genuine ideological conflict rather than a backdrop.
Civil War Lines Expansion.author: jayserpa

Dremora Lines Expansion.summary: Adds unique Dremora dialogue that reflects their culture of domination, pride, and contempt. Makes Daedric encounters feel genuinely alien.
Dremora Lines Expansion.author: jayserpa

Extended Guard Dialogue.summary: Expands guard dialogue with more situation-specific lines for various player states, crimes, and locations. Guards feel more aware.
Extended Guard Dialogue.author: Lawkeeper

Extended Bandit Dialogue.summary: More bandit banter, taunts, and situational reactions. Works alongside Bandit Lines Expansion for comprehensive bandit voice coverage.
Extended Bandit Dialogue.author: Various

Collision Dialogue Overhaul.summary: Adds new NPC reactions when you physically bump into them — less generic, more personality-driven responses based on race and faction.
Collision Dialogue Overhaul.author: Lively

Serana Dialogue Expansion.summary: Massively expands Serana's dialogue with thousands of new lines covering all stages of the Dawnguard questline, follower commentary, and post-quest content. Makes Serana feel genuinely fleshed out.
Serana Dialogue Expansion.author: BugFixes

More to Say.summary: Adds new dialogue to many named NPCs throughout Skyrim, giving them more to say about current events, the player's actions, and their own lives.
More to Say.author: Various

Chatty NPCs and Followers.summary: Makes NPCs and followers comment more frequently on surroundings, events, and the player's actions. Increases ambient conversation density.
Chatty NPCs and Followers.author: Various

Followers React to Crafting.summary: Followers comment when you smith, enchant, and use alchemy stations. Small but surprisingly impactful for immersion during long crafting sessions.
Followers React to Crafting.author: Various

Companions Dialogue Bundle.summary: Adds new dialogue to Companions members, improving their reactivity and presence throughout the questline and beyond.
Companions Dialogue Bundle.author: jayserpa

Nordic Faces - Immersive Characters Over.summary: Overhauls the faces of all vanilla NPCs with high-quality, lore-appropriate looks. Normals feel like Nords, Dunmer look alien, Khajiit look distinctive. Applies to all major and minor NPCs.
Nordic Faces - Immersive Characters Over.author: Sarthes Arai

Lux.summary: Comprehensive interior lighting overhaul using real light sources. Every indoor space is dramatically improved with atmospheric, source-accurate lighting. One of LoreRim's foundational visual mods.
Lux.author: altasilvapuer

Lux Via.summary: Extends Lux's lighting approach to roads and exterior paths — lanterns, torches, and roadside lights are placed accurately and consistently throughout Skyrim.
Lux Via.author: altasilvapuer

Lux Orbis.summary: Lux's exterior lighting companion — handles exterior light sources on buildings, in cities, and around notable locations. Completes LoreRim's lighting overhaul.
Lux Orbis.author: altasilvapuer

Embers XD.summary: Overhauls all fire and ember effects — campfires, hearths, torches, and braziers. Fire looks dynamic and alive. One of the most impactful visual improvements to interiors and campsites.
Embers XD.author: Mindflux

Happy Little Trees.summary: Overhauls tree meshes throughout Skyrim with fuller, more natural-looking canopies. Dramatic improvement to forested areas without significant performance cost.
Happy Little Trees.author: Hein84

Folkvangr - Grass and Landscape Overhaul.summary: Replaces Skyrim's grass system with lush, dense, varied ground cover. Fields and meadows look dramatically more natural. Performance-intensive but visually excellent.
Folkvangr - Grass and Landscape Overhaul.author: Kojak747

Skyland AIO.summary: All-in-one texture overhaul for architecture, landscapes, and clutter across all of Skyrim. Covers nearly every surface with high-quality 2K textures. Core of LoreRim's visual foundation.
Skyland AIO.author: Gutris1

Static Mesh Improvement Mod.summary: Greatly improves 3D models for fences, chains, ropes, candles, cauldrons, and thousands of other objects. Foundational mesh quality improvement touching nearly every space in the game.
Static Mesh Improvement Mod.author: Brumbek

Better Dynamic Snow SE.summary: Replaces Skyrim's static snow shaders with dynamic ones that match terrain lighting and normals. Snow looks part of the world rather than painted on top.
Better Dynamic Snow SE.author: Hein84

Nature of the Wild Lands.summary: Overhauls outdoor vegetation — adding bushes, undergrowth, rock plants, and improved tree density in specific biomes. Makes forests and wilderness feel genuinely wild.
Nature of the Wild Lands.author: Drengin

Northern Roads.summary: Overhauls Skyrim's roads and paths with improved geometry, better curves, and contextual road furniture. Makes travel feel more grounded in the world.
Northern Roads.author: T4gtr34um3r

eFPS - Exterior FPS boost.summary: Improves exterior performance by culling objects and cells that aren't visible from your current vantage point. Significant FPS improvement in cities and dense exterior areas.
eFPS - Exterior FPS boost.author: Kvitekvist

Flat World Map Framework (FWMF).summary: Replaces Skyrim's 3D world map with a flat paper map style. LoreRim uses multiple paper map modules — Skyrim, Solstheim, Wyrmstooth, Vigilant, and more.
Flat World Map Framework (FWMF).author: Limon

DynDOLOD.summary: Generates dynamic distant object LOD for trees, structures, and terrain. Pre-generated for LoreRim — dramatically improves distant landscape quality and eliminates LOD pop-in. Do not regenerate without following the LoreRim guide.
DynDOLOD.author: sheson

JK's Dragonsreach.summary: Overhauls Dragonsreach interior with new furniture, decorations, and architectural detail. Part of the JK's Interiors series that overhauls every major interior in Skyrim.
JK's Dragonsreach.author: Jkrojmal

JK's The Bannered Mare.summary: Overhauls the Bannered Mare tavern with more furniture, atmosphere, and detail. Part of JK's Interiors series.
JK's The Bannered Mare.author: Jkrojmal

JK's Blue Palace.summary: Overhauls the Blue Palace in Solitude with regal new furnishings and architectural details appropriate for Skyrim's seat of power.
JK's Blue Palace.author: Jkrojmal

JK's College of Winterhold.summary: Transforms the College of Winterhold into a proper magical institution with libraries, study areas, and research facilities appropriate for a mage guild.
JK's College of Winterhold.author: Jkrojmal

JK's Castle Volkihar.summary: Overhauls the Volkihar vampire castle with properly ominous and opulent furnishings suited to an ancient vampire lord's stronghold.
JK's Castle Volkihar.author: Jkrojmal

JK's The Ragged Flagon.summary: Overhauls the Thieves Guild's Ragged Flagon tavern with a properly seedy, atmospheric underground look.
JK's The Ragged Flagon.author: Jkrojmal

JK's Sky Haven Temple.summary: Transforms Sky Haven Temple into a properly grand Blades headquarters with ancient Akaviri splendor.
JK's Sky Haven Temple.author: Jkrojmal

JK's Jorrvaskr.summary: Overhauls the Companions' hall with proper mead hall grandeur and warrior culture aesthetics.
JK's Jorrvaskr.author: Jkrojmal

Cities of the North - Dawnstar.summary: Overhauls Dawnstar into a proper northern mining and fishing town with new buildings, NPC routines, and atmospheric detail.
Cities of the North - Dawnstar.author: JPSteel2

Cities of the North - Falkreath.summary: Overhauls Falkreath into a dense logging and funeral town, fitting for a settlement built around Skyrim's largest cemetery.
Cities of the North - Falkreath.author: JPSteel2

Cities of the North - Morthal.summary: Overhauls Morthal into a proper swamp town — misty, eerie, and more populated. Fits the Hjaalmarch hold's sinister atmosphere.
Cities of the North - Morthal.author: JPSteel2

Cities of the North - Winterhold.summary: Overhauls the ruins of Winterhold with the feel of a once-great city reduced to a shadow of its former self — haunting but with more to explore.
Cities of the North - Winterhold.author: JPSteel2

Capital Whiterun Expansion.summary: Expands Whiterun with new districts, buildings, and population. Makes the hold capital feel like Skyrim's most important city.
Capital Whiterun Expansion.author: SirJesto

Capital Windhelm Expansion.summary: Expands Windhelm with new buildings and districts, making the ancient Nord city feel like a proper northern capital.
Capital Windhelm Expansion.author: SirJesto

GG's Thieves Guild Headquarters.summary: Dramatically expands the Thieves Guild headquarters in the Ratway with new rooms, facilities, and atmosphere appropriate for a criminal organization of that scale.
GG's Thieves Guild Headquarters.author: GG77

SKY CITY - Markarth Rising.summary: Massively expands Markarth by adding upper districts carved into the cliffs above the city. Makes the Reach's capital feel like the enormous Dwemer structure it should be.
SKY CITY - Markarth Rising.author: Elianora

Riften Docks Overhaul.summary: Overhauls Riften's lakeside docks with more boats, fisheries, and maritime activity. Makes the docks feel like the working waterfront of a trade city.
Riften Docks Overhaul.author: Various

The Great City of Solitude SSE.summary: Expands Solitude with new districts, buildings, and more life in Skyrim's grand capital city. Part of The Great Cities series.
The Great City of Solitude SSE.author: Various

The Great Town of Ivarstead SSE.summary: Expands Ivarstead into a proper town at the base of the Throat of the World — more buildings, more NPCs, more reason to visit.
The Great Town of Ivarstead SSE.author: Various

The Great Town of Shor's Stone SSE.summary: Expands Shor's Stone from a tiny hamlet into a proper mining town with more buildings and NPCs.
The Great Town of Shor's Stone SSE.author: Various

The Great Village of Kynesgrove.summary: Expands Kynesgrove from a tiny inn stop into a proper village with homes, workers, and atmosphere.
The Great Village of Kynesgrove.author: Various

The Great Village of Old Hroldan SSE.summary: Transforms Old Hroldan inn into a proper historical landmark village with more buildings and lore-appropriate atmosphere.
The Great Village of Old Hroldan SSE.author: Various

The Great Town of Karthwasten SSE.summary: Expands the silver mining settlement of Karthwasten into a proper working town with more homes and infrastructure.
The Great Town of Karthwasten SSE.author: Various

JK's Riverwood.summary: Overhauls Riverwood's shops, homes, and public spaces. Part of JK's Exteriors series, which also includes patches for compatibility.
JK's Riverwood.author: Jkrojmal

Nightgate Inn Revived.summary: Transforms the Nightgate Inn from a forgotten roadside stop into a proper, atmospheric refuge in Skyrim's frozen northern reaches.
Nightgate Inn Revived.author: Various

Stendarr Rising - The Hall of the Vigila.summary: Rebuilds the Hall of the Vigilant as a proper fortified outpost before the Dawnguard attack. Also adds a new Hall of the Vigilant location post-questline.
Stendarr Rising - The Hall of the Vigila.author: Various

Audio Overhaul for Skyrim.summary: Comprehensive audio overhaul touching hundreds of sounds — footsteps, weapon impacts, magic effects, ambient noise, and more. Makes combat sound powerful and the world feel alive. Core audio mod for LoreRim.
Audio Overhaul for Skyrim.author: David Jegre

Immersive Sounds - Compendium.summary: High-quality sound replacements for weapons, armor, magic, and movement. Works alongside Audio Overhaul for a complete sonic experience. Combat sounds have genuine weight.
Immersive Sounds - Compendium.author: lazygecko

Regional Sounds Expansion.summary: Adds region-specific ambient sounds to wilderness, dungeons, and towns. The tundra sounds different from the Reach; dungeons have their own audio signature.
Regional Sounds Expansion.author: clofas1

Reverb Interior Sounds Expansion.summary: Adds proper reverb and echo to indoor spaces. Dungeons echo, caves boom, small rooms sound intimate. Massive atmospheric improvement.
Reverb Interior Sounds Expansion.author: clofas1

BA Bard Songs.summary: Adds new bard songs to taverns and inns throughout Skyrim, expanding the vanilla selection dramatically. Bards finally feel like real entertainers.
BA Bard Songs.author: Various

Thundering Shouts Loose files.summary: Replaces shout sound effects with powerful, resonant versions that feel appropriately divine in scale. Shouting finally sounds as epic as it should.
Thundering Shouts Loose files.author: Various

Airgetlam - Shouts SFX.summary: Alternative shout sound replacement with distinctive effects for each shout type. Works alongside Thundering Shouts for comprehensive shout audio.
Airgetlam - Shouts SFX.author: Various

Yggdrasil SoundFX.summary: Immersive ambient soundscape overhaul with nature sounds, wind variations, and environmental audio that changes by region and time of day.
Yggdrasil SoundFX.author: Various

Nyghtfall - Dark Fantasy Music.summary: A new music mod adding dark fantasy tracks that blend seamlessly with Skyrim's atmosphere. Expands the music rotation for exploration and dungeon crawling.
Nyghtfall - Dark Fantasy Music.author: Various

LORKHAN - Soundtrack Replacer.summary: Replaces portions of Skyrim's soundtrack with dark, moody music fitting LoreRim's tone.
LORKHAN - Soundtrack Replacer.author: Various

Wildwood Echoes.summary: Part of clofas1's ambient sound series — adds rich forest and wilderness soundscapes to outdoor areas.
Wildwood Echoes.author: clofas1

Wheeler - Quick Action Wheel Of Skyrim.summary: Adds a configurable radial action wheel for quick access to spells, items, shouts, and powers. Essential for LoreRim's complex builds — bind your combat rotation and consumables for fast access in combat.
Wheeler - Quick Action Wheel Of Skyrim.author: Ersh

TrueHUD - HUD Additions.summary: Adds target health bars, boss health bars, player widget, and resource indicators to the HUD. Essential for understanding fight dynamics in Requiem's tough encounters.
TrueHUD - HUD Additions.author: Ersh

moreHUD SE.summary: Adds target information, item XP progress, and enemy health percentage to the HUD. More information means better decisions in Requiem.
moreHUD SE.author: Ahzaab

SmoothCam.summary: Overhauls Skyrim's third-person camera with smooth interpolation, configurable offsets, and over-the-shoulder presets. LoreRim includes multiple presets — try each and pick your preference.
SmoothCam.author: mrowrpurr

CoMAP - Common Marker Addon Project.summary: Adds new map marker types for undiscovered locations, custom markers, and improved marker icons. Makes navigation and exploration tracking more informative.
CoMAP - Common Marker Addon Project.author: Various

Detection Meter.summary: Adds a visual detection meter showing when NPCs are about to spot you. Essential for stealth gameplay — gives clear feedback on your detection risk.
Detection Meter.author: Parapets

Security Overhaul SKSE - Lock Variations.summary: Adds varied lock models for chests, doors, and containers based on faction and location. Different locks look and feel different throughout Skyrim.
Security Overhaul SKSE - Lock Variations.author: RealmFighter

Oblivion Interaction Icons.summary: Replaces the generic 'E to activate' prompt with context-sensitive icons showing the specific action — Open, Talk, Take, Search, etc.
Oblivion Interaction Icons.author: colinswrath

Custom Skills Framework.summary: Framework allowing mods to add entirely new skill trees visible in the skills menu. Used by several LoreRim mods to display custom progression systems.
Custom Skills Framework.author: Parapets

PhotoMode.summary: Adds a photo mode — pause, adjust camera, change lighting, remove HUD, and take screenshots. Perfect for capturing LoreRim's beautiful visuals.
PhotoMode.author: Ersh

Bears of the North.summary: Replaces Skyrim's bear models with massive, realistic bears that look genuinely imposing. Brown bears, black bears, and cave bears all get unique models.
Bears of the North.author: T4gtr34um3r

Fluffworks (Fluffy Animals).summary: Adds realistic fur shaders and improved fur geometry to horses, wolves, foxes, dogs, and many other animals. Animals finally look like they have real fur.
Fluffworks (Fluffy Animals).author: Cabal

Skeleton Replacer HD.summary: Replaces all skeleton enemies with high-detail mesh overhauls. Different skeleton types — draugr, ancient, and unique boss variants all get distinct looks.
Skeleton Replacer HD.author: Kajuan

Dragons SE.summary: High-resolution dragon retextures with improved scale and wing details. Multiple dragon variants get distinct looks rather than sharing the same base texture.
Dragons SE.author: Kajuan

Draugrs - New models and textures.summary: Complete visual overhaul of all draugr types with higher-poly models and accurate tomb-wrapping detail. One of the most common enemy types finally looks the part.
Draugrs - New models and textures.author: Kajuan

HAGRAVEN.summary: Complete hagraven visual overhaul with more detailed and disturbing models. Hagravens become properly unsettling again.
HAGRAVEN.author: Kajuan

MM - Real Skeevers.summary: Replaces skeever models with realistic rat-like rodents that look genuinely plague-ridden and dangerous.
MM - Real Skeevers.author: Mihail

Falmer Overhaul - New models and texture.summary: Replaces Falmer models with more detailed, disturbing versions that better convey their de-evolved horror.
Falmer Overhaul - New models and texture.author: Kajuan

CBBE 3BA (3BBB).summary: Advanced female body physics mesh for Skyrim SE. Required by most 3BA-tagged armor conversions in LoreRim's wardrobe.
CBBE 3BA (3BBB).author: Acro

Caliente's Beautiful Bodies Enhancer -CB.summary: The foundational female body replacer for Skyrim SE. Base mesh required by all CBBE-tagged clothing, armor, and related mods in LoreRim.
Caliente's Beautiful Bodies Enhancer -CB.author: Caliente

High Poly Head SE.summary: Replaces vanilla NPC and player head meshes with high-polygon versions for dramatically improved facial geometry. Required for many character presets in LoreRim.
High Poly Head SE.author: KouLeifoh

Expressive Facegen Morphs SE.summary: Unlocks many face morph options hidden in the vanilla game, allowing far more expressive and diverse character faces.
Expressive Facegen Morphs SE.author: Niroku

Expressive Facial Animation - Female Edi.summary: Replaces female NPC facial animation rigs with more expressive, nuanced versions. Emotional states and conversations feel more natural.
Expressive Facial Animation - Female Edi.author: Niroku

Expressive Facial Animation - Male Editi.summary: Same as the female edition but for male NPCs — more expressive faces and natural emotional reactions during dialogue.
Expressive Facial Animation - Male Editi.author: Niroku

Ancient Dwemer Metal.summary: High-quality metal retexture for all Dwemer architecture and objects — gates, pipes, cogs, and constructs. Dramatically improves Dwemer ruins.
Ancient Dwemer Metal.author: Xtudo

Vanaheimr - Landscapes.summary: Comprehensive landscape texture overhaul covering dirt, snow, stone, and ground cover across all of Skyrim. High-quality replacements with parallax support.
Vanaheimr - Landscapes.author: Pfuscher

Enhanced Rocks and Mountains.summary: High-resolution texture overhaul for all rocks and mountain surfaces. Detailed normal maps and parallax support make terrain surfaces look dimensional.
Enhanced Rocks and Mountains.author: DynDOLOD Team

Windhelm - Icy Windhelm.summary: Adds ice and snow to Windhelm's surfaces, making the ancient Nord city look properly frozen in the harsh northern climate.
Windhelm - Icy Windhelm.author: Various

Cabbage ENB - Lore Cut.summary: LoreRim's default ENB preset — cinematic lighting with accurate color temperatures and strong ambient occlusion. Designed to complement Northern Roads and LoreRim's visual suite.
Cabbage ENB - Lore Cut.author: Various

Rudy HQ - Miscellaneous SE.summary: High-quality texture replacements for various miscellaneous objects — candles, pots, dishes, and other small items throughout Skyrim.
Rudy HQ - Miscellaneous SE.author: Rudy102

Snazzy Interiors.summary: Part of the Snazzy Interiors series — comprehensive interior overhauls for major Skyrim cities. Each location gets themed furniture, decorations, and improved layouts.
Snazzy Interiors.author: Jkrojmal

Environs - The Ruined Tundra Farmhouse.summary: Part of the Environs series — adds detail and story to ruined tundra farmhouses, giving abandoned places a sense of history.
Environs - The Ruined Tundra Farmhouse.author: JPSteel2

Environs - Kolskeggr.summary: Part of the Environs series — overhauls Kolskeggr mine and surrounding area with more detail and atmosphere.
Environs - Kolskeggr.author: JPSteel2

Ryn's Standing Stones.summary: Part of Ryn's location overhaul series — redesigns all Standing Stone sites with unique architecture and environmental storytelling.
Ryn's Standing Stones.author: Ryn

Ryn's Dragon Mounds Collection.summary: Part of Ryn's series — overhauls dragon burial mounds with more imposing and atmospheric designs.
Ryn's Dragon Mounds Collection.author: Ryn

Ryn's Saarthal.summary: Overhauls Saarthal — the ancient Nord burial site and College quest location — with more impressive scale and detail.
Ryn's Saarthal.author: Ryn

Ruins Clutter Improved SE.summary: Improves the clutter, pottery, and small objects found in Nordic ruins. More variety and higher quality across all dungeon environments.
Ruins Clutter Improved SE.author: Nsk13

Book Covers Skyrim.summary: Replaces all 820 in-game books with unique cover art matching each book's title and content. Dramatically improves the feel of libraries and loot.
Book Covers Skyrim.author: DanielCoffey

ElSopa - Potions Redone.summary: Replaces all potion bottles with distinct, hand-crafted 3D models for each potion type. No more identical bottles with different labels.
ElSopa - Potions Redone.author: ElSopa

Praedy's Staves AIO.summary: Complete visual overhaul for all staves in Skyrim. Each staff type has a unique, high-quality model. Essential for any staff-wielding mage build.
Praedy's Staves AIO.author: Praedy

JS Dragon Claws AE Anniversary Edition.summary: High-quality replacements for all dragon claw puzzle keys. Each claw has a unique, detailed model matching its namesake dragon.
JS Dragon Claws AE Anniversary Edition.author: johnskyrim

JS Shrines of the Divines SE.summary: Replaces all shrine models with intricately detailed versions for each of the Nine Divines. Shrines become proper objects of reverence.
JS Shrines of the Divines SE.author: johnskyrim

Gemling Queen Jewelry SE.summary: High-resolution retextures for all jewelry in Skyrim — rings, necklaces, and circlets with proper gem rendering and metalwork.
Gemling Queen Jewelry SE.author: Mindflux

Happy Little Trees.summary: Overhauls tree meshes throughout Skyrim with fuller, more natural-looking canopies. Dramatic improvement to forested areas without significant performance cost.
Happy Little Trees.author: Hein84

Animated Ships.summary: Adds animated sails and rigging to ships in Skyrim's ports and seas. Ships look alive in the water instead of static props.
Animated Ships.author: Various

Simple Follower Framework.summary: Lightweight follower management framework — dismiss, teleport, and manage followers without bloat. Compatible with custom-voiced followers.
Simple Follower Framework.author: Various

Press E to Heal Followers.summary: Allows healing downed followers with a button press instead of using restoration spells manually. Makes follower management less frustrating in tough fights.
Press E to Heal Followers.author: Various

Simple Outfit System.summary: Allows setting follower outfit profiles that persist through inventory changes. Followers stay dressed how you want without constant micromanagement.
Simple Outfit System.author: Various

Swiftly Order Squad - Follower Commands.summary: Quick-access command wheel for followers — wait, follow, sneak, combat, etc. Makes managing multiple followers smooth without menu diving.
Swiftly Order Squad - Follower Commands.author: Various
